productDisplayName: Tokyo Talkies Women Printed Blue Top
description: Composition Blue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed V-neck, short sleeves and grunge look graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash using mild detergent Do not bleach Do not dry in direct sunlight Warm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroidery Custom graphics add to the edgy look of this tokyo talkies T-shirt. The grunge look graphic print on the front takes you back in time to the 1960's with the flower power card images, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans, carpis or shorts. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'7' and chest 33"
